meta.name: SW Design System Deprecated Tokens
meta.description: Records deprecated states, tokens, and naming conventions. Merged with governance/deprecated.json scope.

deprecatedStates.name: hover
deprecatedStates.reason: HD-2: Figma does not define a hover state for Input. Hover tokens removed.

deprecatedTokens.reason: HD-2: Figma does not define hover for Input. Removed.
HD-2: Figma does not define hover for Input. Removed.
HD-3: Focus bg = default bg (white). No visual change. Token redundant.
HD-8: Error bg = default bg (white). No visual change. Token redundant.
Ghost is not an official V2.4 variant. Deprecated 2026-05-11. Replaced by blue-line.
deprecatedTokens.removedAt: pending (legacy tokens still in tokens.css for backward compat)

deprecatedTokens.reason: Danger variant deleted. No service usage. Re-addition prohibited.
